local_adapter.download_hook: manual optional: fetch the case_file_url if exact upstream inspection is needed

adaptation.purpose: CMPO microgrid stress benchmark derived from a public OPF case.
adaptation.not_claimed: Not an AC OPF reproduction and not a live QCi hardware run.
changes: Uses PGLib bus active loads as normalized microgrid load anchors.
Uses PGLib generator capacities and linear cost slopes as thermal generator anchors.
Adds PV, BESS, PCC, critical-load, and upgrade fields required by the CMPO workflow.
Uses PGLib branch endpoints and ratings as microgrid tie-line topology anchors.
